title: Issue with a new Project Portfolio

posts.author: MichalJurnik (Michal Jurnik | Intelstudios.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @all,

I’m running into an issue with Project Portfolio and wondering if anyone else has experienced something similar.

I have a portfolio in Workspace 1 that’s connected to a project in Workspace 2. Both workspaces are private, and since I’m not a member of Workspace 2, I can’t see the columns of the connected board.

The problem is, I can’t identify which project in Workspace 2 is actually connected. I also can’t view which boards are linked through the Project Tasks – they just appear as inaccessible.

Has anyone come across this before? Any tips on how I can trace or identify the connected project?

Thanks!
